prestazioni: FA20 (4U-GSE) engine: Full forged internals with JE 87.5mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S billet crankshaft for 300+ whp reliability on E85
Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II with a custom 3.5-inch divorced wastegate manifold (RevWorks) and 44mm external wastegate (TurboSmart Comp-Gate 44) for spool under 3,500 RPM
Fuel System: Full return-style setup with Radium Engineering dual catch cans, ID1000x injectors, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump paired with an AEM 340 LPH external pump for E85 compatibility
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap) and extended wheel arches to fit Work Emotion CR Kiwami 18x9.5 +30 wheels
Seibon Carbon fiber GT-style hood with integrated NACA ducts and a custom 3D-printed air curtain splitter (Aeroflow Dynamics) for front-end downforce
OEM+ rear diffuser delete with a custom 3-piece aluminum diffuser (Varis Japan) and dual 3.5-inch titanium exhaust tips (HKS Hi-Power Ti) for weight reduction and aggressive tone
